title: Neighbors
subtitle: The building directory. You only share your phone number if you want to — you can message anyone regardless.
visibilityOn: neighbors can see your name and phone number
visibilityOff: your number is hidden, but messages can still reach you
empty: No one's here yet besides you. Neighbors will show up as they join with an access code for their unit.
chatStart: Start of the conversation. Only the two of you can see these messages.
demoNote: This is a sample conversation. In production, messages are delivered to the other side instantly.
toastNowHidden: Your phone number is now hidden
toastNowVisible: Neighbors can now see your number
